sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, values Array(Int32), extra_value Nullable(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) * (SELECT count(*) FROM test_data WHERE id = t.id) AS multiplied_values FROM test_data AS t;
SELECT id, arrayJoin([1, 2, 3]) * extra_value AS result FROM test_data WHERE extra_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, SUM(arrayJoin(values) * (SELECT SUM(values[1]) FROM test_data)) AS total FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING total > 50;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) * IF(extra_value * 2 < 10, 1, 0) AS filtered_result FROM test_data WHERE arrayJoin(values) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE id < t.id) AS interaction FROM test_data AS t JOIN test_data AS t2 ON t.id = t2.id OR t.extra_value IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT max(id) FROM test_data) AS max_id SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) * max_id AS multiplied FROM test_data WHERE id <= max_id;
SELECT id, arrayJoin([1, 2, NULL]) * COALESCE(extra_value, 0) AS coalesced_result FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE temp_test_data AS SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) AS flat_values FROM test_data WHERE extra_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) * (CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS conditional_result FROM test_data HAVING conditional_result > 0;
